name: BounCA API
description: BounCA is a PKI (Public Key Infrastructure) certificate authority management tool. Built on Django REST Framework, it provides a web interface and REST API for creating and managing Root CAs, Intermediate CAs, and end-entity certificates (server, client, code signing).
